title: Gulacha Ganapati
actors: Chitra, Purushottam Laxman Deshpande, Vinay Kale
plot: This is the story of a simple, happy go lucky, poor but with a heart of gold man named "Narya" (Shri P.L.Deshpande) who lives in a chawl and works at a local grocery stores. His loyal and honest nature often lands him in trouble b...
